The caller must be the current authority."}},"title":"LendingCoreV2","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{"depositCollateralFor(address,uint256)":{"notice":"Deposit collateral on behalf of a beneficiary."},"liquidationNotifier()":{"notice":"Optional post-liquidation notifier. Set at construction; address(0) disables the hook."}},"notice":"V2 of LendingCore with two additions over the base contract: 1. `depositCollateralFor(address beneficiary, uint256 amount)`: same logic as    `depositCollateral` but credits `beneficiary`'s position instead of msg.sender.    Restricted to approved routers via AccessManager (uses `restricted` modifier). 2. Optional post-liquidation hook: after `_liquidateOneFrom` completes, if    `liquidationNotifier` is non-zero, calls `ILiquidationNotifier.notifyLiquidation()`    wrapped in try/catch so notifier failures never revert the liquidation. All existing LendingCore functions are _liquidateOneDelegated(address,address,u.details: External entry point callable only by this contract during batchLiquidate. Required because try/catch only works on external calls.

depositCollateralFor(address,uint256).details: Transfers `amount` of collateral from msg.sender (the router) and credits `beneficiary`'s position — msg.sender's own position is unaffected. Restricted: only callable by approved routers wired via AccessManager.

params.amount: Amount of collateral asset to transfer and credit.
params.beneficiary: The address whose collateral position is credited.

isConsumingScheduledOp().details: Returns true only in the context of a delayed restricted call, at the moment that the scheduled operation is being consumed. Prevents denial of service for delayed restricted calls in the case that the contract performs attacker controlled calls.

paused().details: Returns true if the contract is paused, and false otherwise.

setAuthority(address).details: Transfers control to a new authority. The caller must be the current authority.

depositCollateralFor(address,uint256).notice: Deposit collateral on behalf of a beneficiary.

liquidationNotifier().notice: Optional post-liquidation notifier. Set at construction; address(0) disables the hook.
